_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Skill to interpret planning guidance to discern level of analytical support required.
reference_document_element_description: Skill in designing and executing complex analytical projects independently, including scoping, methodology selection, execution, and executive-level communication of findings.
comments: DCWF ksa superset of WIDAI AB domain. AB-S-003 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: DG-S-009 (DG, cosine: 0.546), AB-S-007 (AB, cosine: 0.512).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 5.2/10 (raw 0.517). Shared vocabulary: [analytical, level, skill]. DCWF-only terms [discern, guidance, interpret, planning, required, support] vs WIDAI-only terms [communication, complex, designing, executing, execution, executive] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.867 (P=0.876, R=0.857). Balanced P/R — the 12-word DCWF element and 19-word WIDAI KSA cover each other's token-level semantic content symmetrically.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: contradiction-dominant (99.9%). Despite 'Superset of' classification, the model detects semantic tension between "Skill to interpret planning guidance to discern level of analytical support requ" and "Skill in designing and executing complex analytical projects independently, incl". Indicates these concepts operate in adjacent but distinct professional domains — shared vocabulary, different application context.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.636 > STS 0.517 (gap +0.119). Independent encoding finds more similarity than cross-attention. Shared surface terms [analytical, level, skill] inflate the bi-encoder, but cross-attention detects semantic divergence beneath the vocabulary overlap.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 15.4%. Shared tokens: [analytical, level, skill]. DCWF-only: [discern, guidance, interpret, planning, required, support]. WIDAI-only: [communication, complex, designing, executing, execution, executive].
